Short CV

Assoc. Prof. Harika Öykü DİNÇ graduated from Marmara University, Department of Biology in 2013.  She completed her master's degree at İstanbul University, Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine, Department of Medical Microbiology in 2015 and her doctorate in the same department in 2021. Between 2017-2020, she worked as an assistant in the Department of Medical Microbiology at Istanbul Okan University Faculty of Medicine, and she worked as a faculty member at Bezmialem Vakıf University, Faculty of Pharmacy, Department of Pharmaceutical Microbiology between 2020-2024. In 2023, she was received the title of Associate Professor in the Department of Medical Microbiology by the Council of Higher Education. Her research areas are virology, immunology and bacteriology.
